content.en:
"The Traceless Territory is a space-time territory, isn't it that we can't enter the space-time territory?"

Ye Tian raised doubts.

The True River Sword Ancestor explained: "The Traceless Territory is indeed a space-time territory, but it is a broken space-time territory, and the space-time lord will also be shattered and thus embedded in the Source Sea. It's like a small world fragment embedded in the Overworld, and there will be a passage into it. "

As soon as Ye Tian heard this, he completely understood.

Subsequently, Ye Tian knew the value of the Traceless Territory.

The Traceless Territory used to be the space-time territory of the Traceless Lord, but unfortunately the Traceless Lord fell, and as for how it fell, the True River Sword Ancestor didn't know.

However, now a huge fragment of the Traceless Territory was embedded in the Source Sea, and it completely belonged to the Source Sea, so they could enter the half-step Eternal Realm.

Of course, the Traceless Territory is also very dangerous, and it contains a very terrifying creature - the Temporal Dragon Python, which may have been once a pet researched and raised by the Traceless Lord.

But now, the Traceless Lord has fallen, and the space-time dragon python can't control it, but it still adheres to the mission of protecting the Traceless territory, and once someone enters the traceless territory, they will be attacked by the space-time dragon python.

And the strength of the space-time dragon python is terrifying, basically it is a half-step eternal realm, and the best of them is comparable to the half-step eternal realm of the extreme realm level.

Therefore, the Supreme One is not suitable to enter the Traceless Territory at all, and to enter is death.

According to the information revealed by the other twelve ancestors, there are three major opportunities in the Traceless Territory.

The first opportunity is the Boundless Sea, and the Boundless Sea in the Traceless Territory will give birth to many rare resources, but it is also the base camp of the space-time dragon python, and if you don't have a strong strength, you will find death if you enter there.

The second opportunity is the Rift Wind Valley, which can be said to be a place of cultivation and a wonder.

There is a strange wind blowing from the Rift Wind Valley all year round, and this strange wind can affect the will of the half-step Eternal Realm.

The soul of the half-step Eternal Realm has merged with the physical body, but it does not mean that there is no will, and the will also exists, and the influence is great.

If you have a strong will, you can stick to your heart, which is of great benefit to the breakthrough, and even helps to break the bottleneck.

And the will of the half-step Eternal Realm is already very strong, and it is very difficult to exercise the will, but Rift Valley can help exercise the will.

Moreover, there is no space-time dragon python in Splitwind Valley, and space-time dragon pythons don't like to go to Rift Valley.

As such, Rift Valley is the safest and easiest place to enter, but it takes a long time to get your will up.

What's more, it is difficult for the half-step Eternal Realm to stay in Rift Valley for a long time, once the time is long, Rift Valley will shatter the will, and thus the body will collapse.

Moreover, the Rift Valley can only be entered at a certain time, and it is impossible to enter at all at other times, and no half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse will stay in the Traceless Territory all the time, that is too dangerous.

Therefore, those half-step Eternal Realms would only stay in Rift Valley for a while before leaving.

And Ye Tian silently wrote down the place in Rift Valley in his heart.

The third chance is the Traceless Mountain, which is the former residence of the Traceless Lord, although it was dilapidated after a great battle, it still left a lot of good things, so the Traceless Mountain is also the biggest opportunity in the Traceless Territory, and it is also a place that many half-step Eternal Realms want to enter.

The day when the Traceless Territory opened was after the three Tribulations, so the Thirteen Ancestors agreed to enter the Traceless Territory together after the three Tribulations.

As for the other members of the inner circle, they were not eligible to enter it, and even the other half-step eternal realms among the members of the inner circle were not eligible to enter.

This kind of opportunity is an opportunity that belongs exclusively to the Thirteen Ancestors, and if Ye Tian hadn't become the Thirteen Ancestors, he would not be qualified to enter it.

Of course, if Ye Tian also found a similar opportunity in the future, he could also tell the True River Sword Ancestor to share some opportunities, which was also one of the purposes of the establishment of the Source God Pavilion.

In the blink of an eye, three tribulation times passed.

On this day, the Thirteen Ancestors gathered in the Source God Pavilion.

"Let's go!"

The Origin God Pavilion teleported the Thirteen Ancestors, spanning a long distance, and directly came to a relatively remote territory.

Soon, the Thirteen Ancestors came to a place, and here there was a hidden half-step Eternal Realm.

"True River Sword Ancestor, your Source God Pavilion actually brought a Ninefold Supreme, what is the origin of this Ninefold Supreme?" a half-step Eternal Realm appeared and asked curiously.

"Wind Patrol Ancestor, this is the thirteenth Ancestor Endless Ancestor of our Source God Pavilion. The True River Sword Ancestor said casually, and then he didn't say much, and the tone of his conversation with the Wind Patrol Source Ancestor was not very good.

It can be seen that the relationship between the True River Sword Ancestor and the Wind Patrol Source Ancestor is not good.

At this time, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor sent a message to Ye Tiandao: "The Wind Patrol Source Ancestor is also one of the extreme realm powerhouses of the Source Sea, but the relationship with the True River Sword Ancestor is not very good, the reason is that he once robbed a chance belonging to the True River Sword Ancestor, in the future, you should be careful with the Wind Patrol Source Ancestor, but don't worry too much, he is also in the Extreme Realm, only a little stronger than you." "

Ye Tian nodded and didn't say anything.

Soon, the one-step half-step Eternal Realm arrived, and hundreds of half-step Eternal Realms gathered here.

"Here we go!"

The rules of the Traceless Territory collided with the rules of the Source Sea, and a crack began to open.

Whoa!!

A half-step Eternal Realm rushed into the rift and entered the Traceless Territory.

Ye Tian also rushed into the Traceless Territory with the True River Sword Ancestor and them.

As soon as he entered the Traceless territory, a roar was heard.

These voices belong to the space-time dragon python!

Bang!!!!

One by one, the space-time dragon pythons that spread across the sky came through the void, and one of them was extremely large, and the aura was terrifying.

"Kill!"

One by one, the half-step Eternal Realm made a move and fought with the space-time dragon python, but their purpose was not to kill the space-time dragon python, but to escape here.

Some of the half-step Eternal Realms rushed towards the Rift Valley, where it was relatively safe, and the space-time dragon python would not go anywhere.

There are also people who don't want to go to Rift Valley, but to Traceless Mountain, although the space-time dragon python can also break into the Traceless Mountain, but in some places of the Traceless Mountain, the space-time dragon python can't enter.

As for the boundless sea, no one dares to go.

Of course, there is no half-step Eternal Realm that wanders around.

The True River Sword Ancestor and the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor directly chose Traceless Mountain, while Ye Tian chose Rift Wind Valley.

He was going to experience the will boost brought about by the chance of this place in Fracture Valley first, and as for Traceless Mountain, it was not too late to go a little more.
